title: Dimetrodon Sunning on a Log Coloring Page
seoTitle: Dimetrodon Sunning on a Log Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Dimetrodon resting on a log in a primeval swamp. Detailed sail and skin textures. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Dimetrodon Sunning on a Log lived before the first dinosaurs appeared, being more closely related to modern mammals than to modern reptiles.
Dimetrodon Sunning on a Log is often mistaken for a dinosaur, but it was actually a synapsid (mammal-like reptile) that lived during the Permian period.
